_note: Phase 4.5 approval-lineage routing rules. Replaces hardcoded authority requirements in C2 resume logic with a data-driven lookup. operator + rationale are implicit for every pause (the operator approving IS the minimum attribution); explicit authority decisions (compliance_authority_decision, legal_authority_decision) are required only when required_authorities has 2+ entries, preserving Phase 4 OFAC non-EU single-authority semantics.
